mnemonics.title: Framework Activities - CPMCD
mnemonics.content:
C - Communication
P - Planning
M - Modeling
C - Construction
D - Deployment

mnemonics.title: CMMI Levels - I'M DOQ
mnemonics.content:
I - Initial (Level 1)
M - Managed (Level 2)
D - Defined (Level 3)
O - Quantitatively Managed (Level 4 - 'O' for Quantitative)
Q - Optimizing (Level 5)
